description: Individual customer support issues with full lifecycle tracking

columns.issue_id: INTEGER PRIMARY KEY — Unique issue ID (auto-incrementing)
columns.group_id: TEXT — Customer segment group identifier (e.g., S1, E1)
columns.open_day: INTEGER — Simulation day when the issue was created
columns.days_open: INTEGER — How many days the issue has been open (increments daily)
columns.resolved_day: INTEGER — Simulation day when resolved (NULL if still open)
